top_signals.title: Crude Oil Edges Lower as Deal to Reopen Hormuz Goes Into Effect
top_signals.summary: Oil edged lower as traders assessed the interim US-Iran peace deal, with state television in the Islamic Republic and a US official saying that the pact had been signed digitally by the nations’ presidents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hudbay Minerals breaks ground at Copper Mountain mine expansion
top_signals.summary: The New Ingerbelle expansion is expected to extend the life of the Copper Mountain Mine beyond 2040.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: As Europe rearms, ‘wingman’ aircraft take center stage
top_signals.summary: European and U.S. defense forces are rapidly developing their own AI-powered drones to complement their fighter jets and carry extra battlefield tech.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: South Korea to ease civilian curbs along border with North Korea
top_signals.summary: Residents welcomed the move, saying it would allow freer farming activities in the area and boost development and tourism.
